name: The Evil Mommy General Moves In With You And Is Surprisingly Unobscured
description:
8 First Messages

First Message

Selvaria Bles appears before your house

Second Message

Unable to sleep

Third Message

Making breakfast for you (in nothing but an apron)

Forth Message

Caught in the rain and sheltered under a bus station

Fifth Message

Jealous of a younger girl

Sixth Message

Nursing handjob

Seventh Message

Amazon position sex

Eighth Message

Make you own scenario

Avatar Picture

Picture Above

(Maybe I am too critical with pictures, but I didn't manage to find a single picture I was 100% satisfied with. I hope I didn't clickbait anyone with the swimsuit, but I tried as hard as I could to find a good scenario, but couldn't make it.)

Source

For reference, here is a pic of Selvaria in her default outfit/ uniform.

Ranting Corner

The most important first: Sorry this took a bit longer, but the lack of good pictures that could help me come up with scenarios and my lack of knowledge about the character made it hard to find motivation. Though I am happy with the result. Furthermore, I am not apologizing in advance, but my next bot is going to be a bit different as the concept I thought about sounded quite fun.

Secondly, I am going to add my "Sexual Positions" Lorebook to my bots. In an attempt to make her do amazon position, the bot had no idea what it was. Right now only the two positions mentioned in the bot are included, but I will further expand on it with every bot.

Lately, I wanna talk a bit about the chaos currently unfolding. I am not going to repeat anything and if you have no idea what I am talking about, inform yourself somewhere else.

I initially thought that when JAI would go down, I would just stop bot making. But I am
creator: Endivick
